names.primary: CHILL, CHILLINESS, COLDNESS, ETC. IN GENERAL
names.latin: CHILL, CHILLINESS, COLDNESS, ETC. IN GENERAL

keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY CHILL, CHILLINESS, COLDNESS, ETC. IN GENERAL. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc. in general : Ant-c., Aran., Arn., Ars., Aur., Cam., Caust., Chin-s., Chin., Eup-p., Grap., Ip., Lyc., Men., Mos., Nat-m., Nux-m., Pul., Saba., Sil., Stap., Ver-a. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., partial or single parts : Ars., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chel., Chin., Ign., Kali-c., Men., Pul., Sec-c., Sep., Sil., Spig., Sul., Ver-a. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., affected part, of : Ars., Bry., Cocc., Led., Rhus-t., Sec-c., Sil. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., onesided : Bar-c., Bry., Carb-v., Caust., Con., Dros., Lyc., Mos., Nux-v., Par., Pul., Rhus-t., Sabi., Sul., Thu. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., left : Carb-v., Rhus-t., Sul. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., right : Bar-c., Sabi. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., external : Ign., Nux-v., Ver-a., Zin. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., heat, alternating with : Am-m., Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Cham., Chin., Eup-p., Gels., Hep., Lach., Merc., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Samb. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., internal : Ars., Calc-c., Laur., Sul. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., abdomen : Amb., Ars., Pho., Sep., Ver-a. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., back (starts in) : Bell., Caps., Caust., Cocc., Dulc., Eup-p., Gels., Hyo., Lach., Lyc., Nat-m., Pul., Rhus-t., Sec-c., Sep., Stap., Stro., Sul. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., extremities : Amb., Bell., Carb-v., Caust., Pul., Sec-c., Sil. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., covers, heat, etc., agg. : Ap., Cam., Ip., Pul., Sec-c., Sep. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., sopor , with : Ant-t., Nux-m., Op., Ver-a. Chill, chilliness, coldness, etc., urinating , on : Nit-ac., Plat., Thu. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
